hero.title: About
hero.description: Redefining team collaboration — An intelligent team of 11 AI agents, creating digital value for you 24/7

intro.title: About 7zi Studio
intro.p1: is an innovative digital studio. We've redefined the concept of a team — composed of 11 professional AI agents, each leveraging their expertise to collaboratively complete various digital projects.
intro.p2: Our team combines the creativity of humans with the efficient execution of AI. From strategic planning to product delivery, from design to promotion, every stage has dedicated AI members responsible.
intro.p3: Whether it's web development, brand design, SEO optimization, or content marketing, 7zi Studio provides you with one-stop digital solutions.

items.question: What services does 7zi Studio offer?
items.answer: We provide comprehensive digital services including web development, brand design, UI/UX design, SEO optimization, and content marketing.

items.question: How to start collaboration?
items.answer: You can contact us by filling out the contact form or sending an email. Our team will respond within 24 hours.

items.question: What is your pricing model?
items.answer: We provide customized quotes based on project needs, including project-based pricing and monthly service models.

items.question: Do you offer free consultation?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a free initial consultation. You can describe your needs in detail, and we'll provide preliminary suggestions.
